channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping into bins private property, 6th July
item.description:
This has been going on for months , people drive into the court and use it as a dump yard , because we have a few biffa bins on both sides people drive in and dump lots of rubbish which leaves the residents who live here no space , rats and foxes , I see the 2 men do this took the reg and inside the boxes and on them displays there addressed which I can not upload but have the details I have also emailed l@q regarding this matter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Patricia Court, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household rubbish dumped, 6th July
item.description:
Old chair and packaging dumped on green
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Petersham Drive, St Paul's Cray, Greater London

item.description:
On the green comms unit on Church Avenue between 13 church avenue and 1 the crescent
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Church Avenue, Beckenham, Greater London

item.title: Street light not working, 6th July
item.description:
Street light not been working for 3+ weeks outside 6 Durban rd.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Durban Road, Beckenham, Greater London

item.title: Chest of drawers, 6th July
item.description:
Reported this on Sunday, got a message today saying issue is resolved. The mattress is gone, but the drawers are still there.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Carysfort Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: In front of my garage, 6th July
item.description:
For 3 days its been here someone left a recliner chair my parents live here for over 23 years and walking by people asking if it blongs To us and they are very frustrated can you please have this removed asap as its upsetting my elderly parents

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eastcote Road, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Badly kept flower bed, 6th July
item.description:
This flower bed is constantly scruffy i cannot remember the last time it was pruned, weeded and had nice flowers in it. Its a mess. Yes Pettswood flower beds are well maintained by Idverde? I have reported this flower bed and grass area many times nothing changes quick spruce up then its left again!!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kent Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constant fly tipping and people breaking into the garages, 6th July
item.description:
People are breaking into the garage AREAS that i PAY RENT FOR AND YESTERDAY I SAW PEOPLE SLEEPING IN THE THE GARAGES THIS IS TOTALLY UNEXCEPTABLE

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Warwick Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Park gates consistently not locked, 6th July
item.description:
To whom it may concern, we have noticed the gate to Lucas Gardens on Vestry Road (at the top of Maude Road) is consistently not locked at sunset. This is leading to antisocial behaviour in the park on a daily basis post sunset. Please confirm that this will be addressed as a matter of urgency.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 42, Vestry Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car left in disabled bay, 6th July
item.description:
There is a Mini Cooper that has been parked in a disabled bay for a very long time now. It is clear that the person does not have the car registered for a permit for our estate and is abusing the blue badge by leaving their car in a disabled bay.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alexandra Mews, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bag dumped on street, 6th July
item.description:
Rubbish bag dumped on Bramerton Road near junction with Village Way

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 101, Bramerton Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street pavements, 6th July
item.description:
Good evening, I would like to report a safety issue on my street. There is an overgrown tree whose roots have lifted and broken the pavement. The roots underneath are pushing up the paving stones, leaving them uneven, broken, and loose. This has become a serious hazard. My son regularly rides his bike along this pavement, and he has now fallen off three times because of the damaged surface, hitting his head on the ground. It is also difficult for pedestrians to walk safely. I would appreciate it if this issue could be inspected and repaired as soon as possible before someone is more seriously injured. Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Merton Road, Thames View, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Bus Station - Damage to road or pavement within the Bus Station

item.title: Graffiti on the door/window bars, 6th July
item.description:
White graffiti on the staff entrance door’s black window bars. This is not the M&S public main entrance to the store. These doors are close to Fee and Brown. What3words sushi.army.cheeks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 42A, High Street, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drain, 6th July
item.description:
Reported previously. Marked as closed. I would say the drain is still closed.
